title: xanthophyllum retinerve
intro: Xanthophyllum retinerve, also known as the reticulated xanthophyllum, is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum retinerve include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Xanthophyllum retinerve include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
